message:
refactor(ars): improve APIs, error handling, and correctness across all 15 ARS modules

Comprehensive pass across the entire ARS (Autonomous Recovery System)
module suite with improvements ranging from API refinements to correctness
fixes. ~2,077 diff lines across 15 modules:

Major changes:
- ars_generalize (+268/-147): refactored generalization pipeline with
  improved pattern clustering, better variable extraction heuristics,
  and more robust template generation from concrete reflex instances
- ars_symbolic_exec (+214/-116): enhanced symbolic execution engine
  with tighter mutation bound checking, improved path coverage for
  CWD and secret leak analysis, and better error propagation
- ars_secret_scan (+82): expanded secret detection patterns, improved
  false-positive filtering for policy.rs regex heuristics
- ars_compile (+81): compiler API improvements for FST generation,
  better error messages for invalid reflex signatures
- ars_blast_radius (+77): extended token-bucket controller with
  maturity tier graduation metrics and degradation detection
- ars_evidence (+96): enhanced evidence ledger with Bayes Factor
  formatting and structured explanation output
- ars_fst (+65): FST handle improvements for hot-path querying

Moderate changes:
- ars_evolve (+42): evolution policy refinements
- ars_intercept (+41): context gate improvements
- ars_serialize (+33): serialization format versioning
- ars_explain (+28): explanation rendering improvements
- ars_federation (+21): federation protocol refinements

Minor changes:
- ars_drift (+17), ars_replay (+16), ars_timeout (+16): small API fixes,
  formatting, and edge case handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
